title: Floral Frenzy
description: Overhauls the flowering azalea, which now bloom in a whole variety of colors. Also improves the models of all various states of the plant.
body:
Ever felt the flowering azalea was a bit... _lacking?_ it's a great block for adding a touch of bougainvillea wonder to a build, or a potted windowside plant, but it's always the same, never exciting...

Another Emphur idea birthed from SMP boredom, no mods required.

![A player looks up at a flowering canopy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6da03b5fbc2bbf76237d6ecabcf78663d942111.jpeg)

### Pack Features:
- Randomized flowering azalea leaves, bush and potted bush.
- 3D flower petals (may impact performance on low end hardware)
- Compatibility with any 16x textures from other packs, including Bare Bones.

Incompatible with bushy leaf resource packs.

![a scene of boats on water, floating lanterns and flowering azalea blooming in pots ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a913440c150566be02a61534cf4c203f90837eb.jpeg)
